meaning: vt.揉(面等)成团,捏制(面包、陶器等),按摩,捏制
examples: She felt him knead the aching muscles.
In the front window, however, you can watch the cooks knead the buns and bake them on a coal-heated drum.
Add some salt, water and knead properly.
On low speed, gradually add the flour, then knead on medium speed for 4 minutes.
Reduce the speed to medium-low and knead for 6 to 8 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
